validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernel_summary WHERE name IS NULL
validation_queries.error_message: Found API calls with null function names

validation_queries.description: Check that we have some kernel calls
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernel_summary
validation_queries.error_message: No kernel calls found in summary

validation_queries.description: Check that we have transpose kernel captured
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernel_summary WHERE name LIKE 'transpose%'
validation_queries.error_message: No kernel calls found in summary

validation_queries.description: Check that we have predefined number of kernel calls
validation_queries.query: SELECT calls as num_calls FROM kernel_summary WHERE name LIKE 'transpose%'
validation_queries.error_message: No kernel calls found in summary

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernels WHERE name IS NULL
validation_queries.error_message: Found kernels with null function names

validation_queries.description: Check that we have kernel entries
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernels

validation_queries.description: Check for kernels with no active time
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernels WHERE (end - start) = 0
validation_queries.error_message: Kernels with no active execution times found

validation_queries.description: Check that we have number of kernel entries as expected number of calls
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernels WHERE name LIKE 'transpose%'
validation_queries.error_message: Mismatch in expected numbers of kernels entries
